what_caught: XSS via meetingUrl in email templates (critical) + HTML injection in all email templates (major) + non-HTTPS URLs accepted (minor)
notes: escapeHtml utility created, HTTPS-only validation, all 3 email templates sanitized

what_caught: leaveSit and cancelSit not transactional — race conditions (2x major)
notes: Both wrapped in db.transaction() with FOR UPDATE, matching joinSit pattern

what_caught: No max length on instructionText, note, bio (minor)
notes: max(500) on instruction/bio, max(200) on note

what_caught: PastSitCard avatar shows wrong person for guest viewer (minor, looks-right-trap)
notes: Added currentUserId prop, compute partner name correctly
